name: io.github.akshitkrnagpal/typesensekit
title: TypesenseKit
description: MCP stdio server exposing Typesense API operations as tools.

environmentVariables.description: URL of the Typesense server, including protocol and port when required.
environmentVariables.name: TYPESENSE_URL

environmentVariables.description: Typesense API key used to authenticate server operations.
environmentVariables.name: TYPESENSE_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Expose only read operations unless explicitly disabled.
environmentVariables.name: TYPESENSEKIT_READ_ONLY

environmentVariables.description: Optional Typesense connection timeout in seconds.
environmentVariables.name: TYPESENSE_CONNECTION_TIMEOUT_SECONDS
